reveal.title: Reveal your identity?
reveal.body: You debated as <anonymousId></anonymousId>. Now that the debate has ended, you can choose to reveal your username — or stay anonymous. This is entirely up to you. If you don’t decide within 48 hours, your anonymity is preserved by default.

outcome.draw: Ended in a draw by mutual agreement
outcome.turnLimit: Reached the turn limit — ended as a draw.

discussion.title: Discussion ({count})
discussion.emptyDescription: Be the first to share your thoughts.
discussion.lockedDescription: Threads close 7 days after the debate ends.
discussion.readOnlyDescription: You can view comments, but posting and voting are disabled until moderation restores this debate.
discussion.placeholder: What shifted for you? What would you have argued differently?
discussion.signInTitle: Sign in to join the discussion
discussion.signInDescription: You'll be able to comment and upvote.

actionsMenu.drawProposed: Your opponent has proposed a draw.
actionsMenu.pendingDraw: You proposed a draw. Waiting for your opponent to respond.
actionsMenu.confirmConcede: Concede the debate? Your opponent wins and your rating will reflect the outcome.
actionsMenu.confirmResign: Resign from the debate? Your seat will open for a replacement and you'll receive a small rating penalty.

turnCard.flagged: This content has been flagged for review.

errors.hiddenByBlockDesc: This debate is hidden by your safety settings.
errors.notFoundDesc: This debate may have been removed or the link may be invalid.

flagged.title: This debate has been flagged for review.

moderation.adminViewDesc: You can view this debate because your role has moderation access.
moderation.participantViewDesc: You can still view your content, but this debate is read-only while hidden.

join.challengedToThis: You were challenged to this debate.
join.waitingChallenger: This debate is waiting for a challenger.
join.challengeActionDesc: Accept to take Side B and start the match, or decline to close this challenge.
join.joinActionDesc: Read Side A's opening argument above, then join as Side B to respond.

replacement.resignedSideOpen: A debater has resigned. Side {side} is open.
replacement.readAndTake: Read the debate so far, then take the open seat to continue.
replacement.opponentResigned: Your opponent resigned. Waiting for a replacement...
replacement.resumeWhenJoined: The debate will resume when a new debater takes the open seat.

extension.waitingOpponent: You agreed to extend. Waiting for your opponent to respond...
extension.waitingOpponentDesc: If they accept, the debate continues for 5 more turns. If they decline, it ends as a draw.
extension.limitReached: Turn limit reached ({limit} turns). Continue for 5 more?
extension.opponentAgreed: Your opponent already agreed to extend.
extension.bothMustAgree: Both sides must agree. Declining ends the debate as a draw.
extension.voting: Turn limit reached. Both sides are voting on whether to extend.
extension.votingDesc: If both agree, the debate continues for 5 more turns.

creatorWaiting.waitingForInvited: Waiting for @{username} to respond to your challenge...
creatorWaiting.waitingForOpponent: Waiting for your invited opponent to respond to your challenge...
creatorWaiting.waitingForChallenger: Waiting for a challenger to join...
creatorWaiting.challengePrivate: This challenge is private between the two of you until they accept.
creatorWaiting.openingLive: Your opening argument is live. A challenger will read it before deciding to join.
creatorWaiting.wantSpecific: Want a specific opponent? Invite them directly.

active.spectatorCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 spectators watching} one {# spectator watching} other {# spectators watching}}

rechallenge.title: Rechallenge
rechallenge.description: Pick how you want to challenge this opponent next.
rechallenge.note: Want a sharper rematch? Try arguing the opposite stance this time.

invite.title: Invite a user
invite.description: Suggested from shared tags and recent debate activity. You can still search anyone by username.
invite.stats: Rating {rating} • {wins}W {losses}L {draws}D • {debates, plural, one {# debate} other {# debates}}

events.seatOpenedActor: {actor} (Side {side}) has resigned. The seat is open.
events.seatOpened: Side {side} has resigned. The seat is open.
events.replacementJoined: A new debater has joined as Side {side}.
events.drawAccepted: Side {side} accepted the draw. The debate ended in a draw.
events.extensionProposedWithLimit: Turn limit reached ({limit} turns). Both sides may agree to extend.
events.extensionProposed: Turn limit reached. Both sides may agree to extend.
events.extensionDeclined: Side {side} declined the extension. The debate ended in a draw.
events.walkoverWithWinner: Side {side} failed to respond in time. Side {winner} wins by walkover.
events.replacementExpiredWithWinner: No replacement joined in time. Side {winner} wins by walkover.
events.extensionExpired: Extension deadline expired. The debate ended in a draw.

report.submitted: Report submitted. Thanks for helping keep discussions safe.
report.rateLimit: You have reached the report limit. Try again later.
report.ownContent: You cannot report your own content.

outline.label: Outline
outline.snippet: Used AI to outline the argument structure.

rewrite.label: Rewrite
rewrite.snippet: Used AI to rewrite for clarity.

grammar.label: Grammar
grammar.snippet: Ran a grammar pass with AI assistance.

sources.label: Sources
sources.snippet: Used AI to suggest source directions.

turnInput.aiNotePlaceholder: Describe how you used AI for this turn — which parts, and how.
turnInput.confirmSubmitText: Once submitted, this turn cannot be edited. Continue?
turnInput.textareaPlaceholder: The evidence suggests the opposite — studies show X [1]. The core issue here is...
turnInput.guidelines: {min}–{max} characters. Once submitted, this turn cannot be edited.

commentCard.deleteConfirm: Delete this comment? This cannot be undone.
commentCard.hiddenModOnly: Hidden by moderation. Visible to moderators/admins only.
commentCard.hiddenAuthorAndModOnly: Hidden by moderation. Visible to you and moderators/admins only.
commentCard.deleteConfirmation: Delete this comment? This cannot be undone.

reportDialog.description: Reports are shown to moderators for enforcement. Moderators review reports and may hide violating content.
reportDialog.detailsPlaceholder: Briefly describe the issue for our moderation team.

errors.detailsTooLong: Details must be at most 500 characters.
